phrases.intent_en: Where do I wait if I arrive early?
phrases.text_local: Kde mám čekat, když přijdu dřív?

likely_response.translation_en: In the foyer by the entrance, please.

responses.english: In the foyer by the entrance, please.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the onyx wall in the tour?
phrases.text_local: Kde je během prohlídky onyxová stěna?
phrases.cultural_note: Guides use simple spatial cues like 'vpravo' (on the right) for clarity.

likely_response.local: V hlavním obytném prostoru, hned vpravo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the main living space, immediately on the right.

responses.english: In the main living space, immediately on the right.
responses.french: V hlavním obytném prostoru, hned vpravo.

phrases.intent_en: Is the winter garden accessible without a guide?
phrases.text_local: Je zimní zahrada přístupná bez průvodce?
phrases.cultural_note: A clear 'ne' (no) with a short condition is standard for access rules.

likely_response.local: Ne, pouze v rámci komentované prohlídky.
likely_response.translation_en: No, only as part of a guided tour.

responses.english: No, only as part of a guided tour.
responses.french: Ne, pouze v rámci komentované prohlídky.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy a Tugendhat chair replica?
phrases.text_local: Mohu si koupit repliku křesla Tugendhat?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct 'ano' (yes) followed by location is a typical staff response.

likely_response.local: Ano, v obchodě se suvenýry u východu.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, in the gift shop by the exit.

responses.english: Yes, in the gift shop by the exit.
responses.french: Ano, v obchodě se suvenýry u východu.

phrases.intent_en: Is photo permit required for the interior?
phrases.text_local: Potřebuji povolení na focení v interiéru?
phrases.cultural_note: Czechs often state the price directly when confirming a fee exists.

likely_response.local: Ano, u pokladny za padesát korun.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the ticket desk for fifty crowns.

responses.english: Yes, at the ticket desk for fifty crowns.
responses.french: Ano, u pokladny za padesát korun.
